Label: County Status
Description: Represents the status classification of a county

Label: Settlement Type
Description: A classification of a settlement, such as rural or urban.

Label: Substance
Description: Represents a substance involved in substance abuse

Label: Substance Related Incident
Description: Represents an incident related to substance abuse

Label: Mental Health Service
Description: Represents a mental health service offering

Label: Mental Health Service Category
Description: Represents a category of mental health services

Label: Treatment
Description: A substance-abuse treatment facility or service.

Label: Treatment Provider
Description: Represents an organization or individual providing treatment services

Label: Answer
Description: A response or value recorded for a variable.

Label: NIBRS Answer
Description: Answer value for a NIBRS variable

Label: NSDUH
Description: National Survey on Drug Use and Health variable

Label: NSDUH Answer
Description: Answer value for an NSDUH variable

Label: Variable
Description: A measured data variable in the rural knowledge graph.

Label: Has Version
Description: Relates a resource to its version

Label: identifier
Description: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.

Label: Has Variable
Description: Associates an entity with a variable

Label: Has RUCC
Description: Associates an entity with a Rural-Urban Continuum Code

Label: Year
Description: Year of data collection or classification

Label: Code
Description: Code identifier for substance abuse entity

Label: Concept Type
Description: Type of concept in substance abuse domain

Label: Contains Service
Description: Indicates that an entity contains a service

Label: Has Answer
Description: Associates a variable with its answer

Label: Is Defined By
Description: Resource that defines the subject resource

Label: Subclass Of
Description: Indicates that a class is a subclass of another class

Label: altLabel
Description: An alternative lexical label for a concept.

Label: exactMatch
Description: Indicates two concepts can be used interchangeably across schemes.

Label: address
Description: The physical address of the item.

Label: contained In Place
Description: The basic containment relation between a place and one that contains it.

Label: postal Code
Description: The postal code of an address.

Label: service Location
Description: The location where a service is provided.
